long_desc: Balthazar, the Guru of Knowledge, looks at a giant book.
detailed_desc:
This is Balthazar, the Guru of Knowledge. He looks like a scientist. He has
a big glass and is wearing a white clothe. He looks at you and says:
"You must know to live a happy life, my friend. A man who has wisdom, need
not to wield weapons. If all the men were wise, no weapons would be created.
Weapons are for non- wise men.
